features: Assorted plaster packs - ideal for adding to first aid kits
Hypoallergenic latex free adhesive minimises risk of allergic reactions
Assortment of our most popular plaster shapes and sizes
Supplied in water resistant resealable polybags
description: Product Description Value Aid 20 x Assorted Washproof Plasters are designed for everyday first aid use, providing reliable protection for minor cuts, grazes and small wounds. The washproof plastic backing helps protect wounds during handwashing, showering and normal daily activities, making these plasters suitable for regular use at home, at work or while travelling. This assorted pack contains 20 washproof plasters in a practical mix of commonly used shapes and sizes. The combination of strip and square plasters allows suitable coverage for fingers, hands and other small areas that are commonly affected during everyday tasks. The latex free, hypoallergenic adhesive is designed to be gentle on the skin while still providing a secure and reliable hold. This helps reduce the risk of irritation for users with sensitive skin. The smooth plastic backing allows the plaster to flex with movement while maintaining consistent coverage throughout the day. Each plaster is individually wrapped for hygienic single-use application, making them suitable for inclusion in home first aid boxes, office and workplace kits, travel bags or as a convenient top-up for existing supplies. The compact 20-pack format offers a practical balance between variety and quantity, ensuring the right plaster size is available when needed without taking up unnecessary space. These washproof plasters are designed for simple, everyday first aid needs where moisture resistance is beneficial. Pack contents: • 6 x Strip Plasters (72 x 19mm) • 6 x Strip Plasters (38 x 19mm) • 4 x Strip Plasters (72 x 25mm) • 4 x Square Plasters (38 x 38mm) Key features: • Assorted washproof first aid plasters • Latex free and hypoallergenic adhesive • Flexible plastic backing • Individually wrapped for hygienic use • Pack of 20 plasters Directions Clean wound and apply plaster directly. Replace when necessary.
